notes: v0.16.83 — Practice rail 2-column layout fix. With the 7 trainer modes added in v0.16.82 the single-column list ran off the bottom of the screen on shorter windows. Now GridContainer 2 cols × 4 rows fits the whole list and gives the detail card on the right a tighter slot. Tile shrunk to 280×110, name font 15 (was 18), preview 100px (was 140) so longer labels like CORE DEFENCE / OVERLOAD GRID stay inside each tile. Windows only.
